privacy.notes: This contract bundle contains synthetic fixtures only.

commands.name: sources scan
commands.notes: Discover IHACPA source pages and record missing or inaccessible artifacts without writing a manifest.

commands.name: sources add-year
commands.notes: Create or update a year manifest after review, using the scanner output as the source of truth.

source_categories.label: Classification resource
source_categories.purpose: Released classification tables and supporting resources.
